name: creativity-graph
description: Turn a non-self-grounding conceptual document into a rigorously-grounded, queryable knowledge graph: a human-editable canon with three-axis provenance, a span-present write boundary, a grounding loop with memory of failures, and a regenerable NetworkX/SQLite derived layer.

domain.title: Conceptual domain
domain.description: The conceptual domain of the source (shapes the domain pack vocabulary).

source_path.title: Source document path
source_path.description: Absolute path to the source document the graph is built and grounded against.

sensitivity.title: Egress sensitivity
sensitivity.description: Egress scrubbing aggressiveness: low = secrets only; medium = + structured PII; high = + person/address heuristics.

metrics_mode.title: Metrics mode
metrics_mode.description: structure_only uses graph structure as signal; with_embeddings adds a gated sqlite-vss candidate generator.
